indicator_context_quality.warn: **Tide check:** Six feet of water does not tell you if the tide is **coming in or going out**. An indicator **value** without **context** (regime, direction, transition, velocity) is **noise** — not memory worth promoting. This silo stores **context around indicators**, not the universe.

pattern_game_meta.note: Equity/risk are spec targets; risk governor still uses tiered notional_fraction.

memory_bundle_proof.execution_pipeline_note: Signals/regime/fusion/risk/execution managers are built from the effective manifest dict inside run_manifest_replay via renaissance_v4.manifest.runtime (build_signals_from_manifest, build_execution_manager_from_manifest, etc.).

replay_data_audit.note: Full dataset — no calendar-month window slice.

referee.note: win_rate is the binary Referee scorecard; expectancy/average_pnl/max_drawdown are portfolio metrics from the same run — do not judge economics from win_rate alone.

learning_run_audit_v1.memory_operator_note_v1: No memory bundle path resolved for this replay — execution-only with respect to promoted memory.
learning_run_audit_v1.groundhog_operator_note_v1: Promoted bundle: auto-merge explicitly disabled for this process.
learning_run_audit_v1.operator_learning_status_line_v1: classification=execution_only; decision_windows=51; candidate_search=not_run (parallel replay path — no multi-replay search in this worker); recall_matches=0; bias_applied_fusion=0 signal=0; memory_merged=no; verdict=execution_only — replayed policy on tape; no memory merge, recall match, bias application, or candidate search in this run.

referee.operator_learning_status_line_v1: classification=execution_only; decision_windows=51; candidate_search=not_run (parallel replay path — no multi-replay search in this worker); recall_matches=0; bias_applied_fusion=0 signal=0; memory_merged=no; verdict=execution_only — replayed policy on tape; no memory merge, recall match, bias application, or candidate search in this run.

signal_behavior_proof_v1.attribution_semantics: per_signal_closed_trade_attribution_count counts each OutcomeRecord.contributing_signals entry (replay_runner copies all signal_names with active=True on the **entry bar** into the trade; it is NOT the fusion-only short list). Fusion picks direction; see fusion_contributing_signals inside trade_entry_raw_samples.

atr_usage_code_references_v1.execution_stop_target: renaissance_v4/research/replay_runner.py passes features.atr_proxy_14 into ExecutionManager.open_trade; renaissance_v4/core/execution_manager.py sets stop_loss / take_profit from atr × atr_stop_mult / atr_target_mult (manifest or defaults).
atr_usage_code_references_v1.signals_note: Signal modules in renaissance_v4/signals/*.py use FeatureSet fields such as volatility_20; they do not reference atr_proxy_14 (repo grep).

outcome_measures.note: Lenses interpret the same Referee row — not a second ledger. win_rate is binary scorecard; money/edge/drawdown are separate questions.

decision_audit.human_readable_summary: Trade decisions came from: (1) manifest JSON on disk, (2) optional CLI/scenario ATR overrides (applied after any bundle), (3) bar data forward in time. No memory bundle was merged. run_memory JSONL / prior session folders are **not** auto-read to alter execution.

post_mortem.note: Fill after review; optional Anna/human — does not affect Referee.
